content.en:
Ye Tian's cultivation has not improved much, and he is still at the eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit Level.

However, he finally repaired the broken Secret Treasure in the past, and also made up for the loss of quantity.

And.

He has a higher degree of control over high-level extra-dimensional things, and he has created some extra-dimensional techniques of high-level extra-dimensional things true inscription stones, which can be regarded as a slight increase in combat effectiveness.

For example, the True Ming Escape Light Technique is one of the extra-dimensional techniques he created, which can make his own speed much faster, and it is much more powerful than the extra-dimensional techniques corresponding to other extra-dimensional things.

Other than that.

He also gave birth to more peak realm gods in the human race.

But even so, the strength of the human race is still not worth mentioning compared to the forces like the Ice Ghost Organization, and the Ice Ghost Organization is actually not very strong, after all, there is not even a half-step transcendent realm, and only dares to hide in the shadows and rob some weaker territories.

......

Ye Tian didn't continue to cultivate, and in a short period of time, it was impossible for him to improve his cultivation, nor could he completely comprehend the true superdimensional power.

So, he relaxed, quietly waited for the arrival of the Galanbol ship, and studied the extradimensional power.

And just like that, the years passed.

this day.

The Garanbao ship broke through the boundary extradimensional barrier of the 7362nd territory and entered the 7362nd territory.

Rumble!!!!!

The Garanbo ship shuttled in and out of the area near the Eternal Border.

Then, a group of pinnacle realm gods immediately headed for the Garanbao ship.

This time, almost all the peak realm gods have passed, and Ye Tian has also brought a group of peak realm gods of the human race over, although they may not necessarily go to trade, but they also have to see the world!

Galanbo on board.

Ye Tian had seen a large number of peak realm gods, and their number far exceeded that of the past.

"There are so many peak realm gods, these peak realm gods, I have never seen them, they are definitely not our territory, and they are definitely not the peak realm gods of the Jialan Treasure Ship. The pinnacle realm gods of the Garanbao ship are all wearing the clothes of the Garanbao ship, but they are not wearing them, they should be the pinnacle realm gods of other realms who have purchased the quota of the Garanbao ship and the ship!"

Ye Tian guessed.

As mentioned before, the extradimensional storm not only affected their 7,362 Territory, but also several territories, and the peak realm gods of these territories naturally wanted to leave their territory.

And the Galanbo ship may have gone to other realms first, and sold a lot of places for the ship, which led to a large number of peak realm gods here.

"It seems that the Garanbao ship does sell a lot of places with the ship, but it's not lying!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

At this time, the Galanbo ship is very lively, and there is still a period of time before the auction of the quota and staff quota of the Galanbo ship.

A pinnacle god was trading in various stalls on the Galanbo ship, occasionally chatting with pinnacle gods from other realms.

Soon.

Ye Tian also knew which realms these peak realm gods came from.

Territory 7,360, Territory 7,361, and Territory 7,364.

These territories are connected to each other.

And the Garanbao ship went to these three realms first, and then came to the seven thousand three hundred and sixty-two territories.

The pinnacle realm gods of these realms can also trade with each other, and the Garan Treasure Ship doesn't care.

However, these peak realm gods have almost exhausted their net worth in order to buy a place with the ship, although there are still rich peak realm gods, but they will not trade casually.

He wandered around the ship to see if anything good had come up.

At this glance, he found that the Galan Treasure Ship took out a lot of good things this time, and even the high-level super dimensional secret treasure was taken out for sale, but the price was very expensive, and the lowest required 500,000 Galanbol coins.

Ye Tianxian exchanged the resources into Garanbao Coins, and easily exchanged three million Garanbao Coins.

Of course, he can exchange more Garanbao Coins, but he won't exchange too much if he doesn't come across the right goodies.

Otherwise, the Galanbol ship left, and his Galanbao coins would be equivalent to scrap, and he would have to wait for hundreds of extradimensional epochs before he could wait for the Garanbol ship to arrive, then he couldn't wait. []

【Garan Killing Spear】

Ye Tian set his sights on this high-level super-dimensional secret treasure, which was worth 800,000 Galanbo coins.

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, and still bought this super dimensional secret treasure.

After all, the Garan Dao Killing Spear has a relatively good increase in his strength, and if he buys it, his strength will increase a lot.

Subsequently, he paid 800,000 Galanbao coins to obtain this high-level super-dimensional treasure.

And then.

He began to select extradimensional Dao inheritances.

【Jiaxi Super Dimensional Dao Species】

This is a top-notch extradimensional Dao lineage, worth 660,000 Gala Treasure Coins.

Ye Tian thought about it, but he still bought it, after all, in the next hundred extradimensional eras, he had no way to obtain the superdimensional Dao inheritance, in case he comprehended the real superdimensional power later, he happened to need the superdimensional Dao inheritance.

If not, wouldn't it be difficult for him to break through to the half-step transcendent realm.

So, buy it first and then talk about it.

Then, he spent 660,000 Jialanbao coins to buy this Jiaxi 350 superdimensional Dao inheritance.

"Next, accept the inheritance!"

Ye Tian immediately accepted the inheritance.

After a long time, the inheritance was accepted.

But he frowned, because he couldn't understand the inheritance, just because the inheritance was composed of extradimensional powers, and it was a superdimensional text, and if he didn't comprehend the real extradimensional power, he couldn't understand the superdimensional Dao inheritance at all.

Of course, if he comprehended the true superdimensional power, he would naturally be able to understand this superdimensional Dao inheritance at a glance.

"It seems that before I comprehend the true superdimensional power, I can't understand these superdimensional Dao inheritances. "

But Ye Tian did not give up the super-dimensional Dao inheritance, he was ready to continue to buy the super-dimensional Dao inheritance.

Because he doesn't look down on the top super-dimensional Dao inheritance, there are definitely better super-dimensional Dao inheritances, such as the perfect super-dimensional Dao inheritance.

Even among the top super-dimensional Dao inheritances, the estimation that the Jialanbao Boat took out was the most ordinary, and the real top-notch super-dimensional Dao inheritance, the Jialanbao Ship was probably reluctant to take it out.

"Buy a few top-notch super-dimensional Dao Inheritances first, and then buy a large number of ordinary extra-dimensional Dao Inheritances!"

In this way, Ye Tian spent all the three million Galanbao coins on his body in one go.

After that, he went to exchange some Galanbao coins.
